jobs.title: CNC Machinist
jobs.salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
jobs.meta_description: Barona Teollisuus Oy is seeking a CNC machinist in Vantaa. We are looking for a skilled CNC machinist with experience in turning and milling to join our
jobs.description: We are looking for a skilled CNC machinist with experience in turning and milling to join our production team at Barona Teollisuus Oy in Vantaa. This permanent employment opportunity offers competitive hourly wages based on Finnish collective agreements, full-time work, and 2-shift rotation. The ideal candidate will utilize modern machinery, possess strong machining skills, and be proficient with Fanuc, Heidenhain, or Mori controls. Responsibilities include programming and running CNC parts, working independently on lathe and machining center tasks, and contributing to the development of small and individual pieces. A stable work environment, access to well-maintained machines, and opportunities for skill development are offered. Apply quickly as this position is expected to fill soon.
what_we_expect: Experience in CNC turning and/or milling and strong machining skills.
Master Fanuc, Heidenhain or Mori controls and capable of independent programming and setting.
Willingness to work in shifts is considered an advantage.
job_responsibilities: The work includes CNC turning and/or milling, machine settings, programming and running parts. On the turning side, you work on a modern DMG Mori NLX 2500 multifunction lathe (M730UM control) and are independently responsible for programming and machining.

On the milling side, the work includes 4-axis machining with Heidenhain controlled machining centers (TNC 530 / 620 / 640). Tasks also include tool selection and optimization, measurements and quality assurance. The manufactured pieces vary from single pieces and small series to prototypes.
We are looking for a skilled CNC machinist to strengthen the production team for versatile turning and milling tasks.
what_we_offer: A stable and developing work environment in a reputable engineering company
Modern and well-maintained machines
The opportunity to influence your own job description
Support from a competent and supportive team
Opportunity to develop skills in demanding and varied machining work
